mapper.select: SELECT m.meetingId, m.title, m.content, s.name AS sportName, CONCAT(r.sido, ' ', r.sigungu, ' ', COALESCE(r.dong, '')) AS regionName, m.placeName, m.address, m.meetingDate, m.startTime, m.status, u.nickname AS hostNickname, lm.messageId AS lastMessageId, lm.content AS lastMessage, DATE_FORMAT(lm.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastMessageAt FROM meetings m JOIN users u ON m.hostUserId = u.userId JOIN sports s ON m.sportId = s.sportId JOIN regions r ON m.regionId = r.regionId LEFT JOIN meetingChatMessages lm ON lm.messageId = ( SELECT cm.messageId FROM meetingChatMessages cm WHERE cm.meetingId = m.meetingId ORDER BY cm.createdAt DESC, cm.messageId DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE m.deletedAt IS NULL AND ( m.hostUserId = #{userId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM meetingParticipants mp WHERE mp.meetingId = m.meetingId AND mp.userId = #{userId} AND mp.status = 'APPROVED' ) ) ORDER BY COALESCE(lm.createdAt, m.meetingDate, m.createdAt) DESC, m.meetingId DESC

SELECT cm.messageId, cm.meetingId, cm.userId, u.nickname, u.profileImage, cm.content, cm.messageType, cm.createdAt FROM meetingChatMessages cm JOIN users u ON cm.userId = u.userId WHERE cm.meetingId = #{meetingId} ORDER BY cm.createdAt ASC, cm.messageId ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meetingChatMessages( meetingId, userId, content, messageType ) VALUES( #{meetingId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{messageType} )
mapper.select: SELECT cm.messageId, cm.meetingId, cm.userId, u.nickname, u.profileImage, cm.content, cm.messageType, cm.createdAt FROM meetingChatMessages cm JOIN users u ON cm.userId = u.userId WHERE cm.messageId = #{messageId}
